articles.title: Iran rejects US ceasefire plan, issues its own demands as strikes land across the Mideast
articles.description:
Iran dismissed an American plan to pause the war in the Middle East and launched more attacks on Israel and Gulf Arab countries

summary: Iran rejected the US ceasefire plan amid ongoing Middle East conflicts.

Boston residents may face increased geopolitical instability affecting local security.

articles.title: Mass. woman killed in 6-vehicle crash in Florida
articles.description:
A chain-reaction crash involving a semi-truck on I-75 left one dead and multiple others seriously injured, authorities say.

The post Mass. woman killed in 6-vehicle crash in Florida appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts woman died in a six-vehicle crash on I-75 in Florida.
The crash involved a semi-truck and left multiple others seriously injured.
Local authorities urge drivers to exercise caution on highways to prevent similar incidents.

articles.title: Record-smashing heat dome is spreading across much of the nation

summary: Record heat dome affects much of the nation, impacting Boston's weather patterns.

Boston residents may face increased heat advisories and health risks this summer.

articles.title: Former Miss Hall’s School teacher at center of grooming allegations is charged with rape
articles.description:

summary: Matthew Rutledge, a former teacher, faces rape charges linked to grooming allegations.

The case raises concerns about student safety in Boston-area prep schools.

articles.title: ‘I had just lost everything’: Kelsey Fitzsimmons testifies in her trial
articles.description:

summary: Kelsey Fitzsimmons testified about being shot by a colleague in North Andover last year.
